jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
